Slots 3-9: F-054 D9 mega-bilaterals of the F-005 institutional hub (per receipt sources/dune/d9-f005-institutional-10k-reprofile-2026-05-21.json). These are the largest USDC/USDT/DAI institutional counterparties of F-005 — likely candidates: Wintermute, Cumberland, B2C2, Galaxy, FalconX, GSR, DRW, Jump.
_meta.outcome: 3 hits / 6 empties. Wintermute first touchpoint in case at 3 of the F-005 D9 mega-bilaterals: 0xdbf5e9c5...1dc080 = Wintermute: Hot Wallet ($590M IN to F-005); 0xf8191d98...73aa = Wintermute: Hot Wallet ($206M IN); 0xdbefb887...b910 = Wintermute trading:b910(related_level_1) ($198M OUT). Combined Wintermute bilateral with F-005 hub: ~$994M lifetime. F-005 institutional hub 0x1990abd6...4181 itself BlockSec-empty (notable - Zonda's largest USDC-MM hub has no institutional-entity attribution). F-044 T2 0x42b6de74...498b BlockSec-empty (sub-network C residual). 6 empties total to Q6e 2026-06-23 +30d. NEW entity in case: Wintermute (major institutional MM). Combined with prior F-054 #1 = Maker RWA-007 / Coinbase Custody, F-005's institutional surface now ~$2B+ resolved (Wintermute + MakerDAO RWA + Circle + FalconX from earlier Q1).
